form.formComment: Having her first run at Warragul. Comes off an average run last start over 390m at Warrnambool when fifth behind Aston Blitz (22.96) in Bottom Up - Restricted Win. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Having her first run at Warragul. Comes off an average run last start over 390m at Warrnambool when fifth behind Aston Blitz (22.96) in Bottom Up - Restricted Win. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Strongly fancied last time and hit the ground running with a fast early split, paving the way for a 4.5 lengths win at Ballarat over 390m in 22.27. Has hit winning form and can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strongly fancied last time and hit the ground running with a fast early split, paving the way for a 4.5 lengths win at Ballarat over 390m in 22.27. Has hit winning form and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors at big odds two back when third (23.56) over 410m at Horsham. Has a squeeze box to navigate but is among the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors at big odds two back when third (23.56) over 410m at Horsham. Has a squeeze box to navigate but is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 300m at Healesville. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 300m at Healesville. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Faltered turning into home straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 22.81 over 400m at this track. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (23.33) over 400m at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Solid top-three prospects.
